markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 140-D — Roundabout

A circular intersection which is characterized by a circulatory roadway with counterclockwise movement, channelized approaches, low speeds, and yield control of entering traffic. A roundabout encompasses the area bounded by the outermost curb line or, if there is no curb, the edge of the pavement, and includes crosswalks on any entering or exiting roadway.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
